Appearances:

Defendant Vi Ly is present.
Attorney Hope Greenhill appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of is APR-18-2016 vacated. (JPT/501)
